wizard.title: Create SensorThings entities
wizard.subtitle: Choose whether to create one entity or build a guided associated setup.
wizard.single_mode_description: Create one Thing, Location, Sensor, Observed Property, or Datastream at a time.
wizard.associated_mode_description: Configure each step and decide whether to create a new entity or reuse an existing one. The wizard will then create or update the related resources in sequence.
wizard.single_description: This mode preserves quick creation for a single entity inside the new wizard shell.
wizard.advanced_section_description: Use this section only if you need to create a new entity for the current step.
wizard.existing_entity_placeholder: For now, enter an @iot.id or your internal reference. We can later replace this with an autocomplete.
wizard.existing_entity_help: This is the right hook for a future searchable selector backed by the API.
wizard.review_description: This summary shows the wizard state before the step-by-step create or update flow runs.

data_sources.title: Data sources
data_sources.subtitle: The first data source is used for login and all application data.
